recipes.name: Sheet Pan Chicken Fajitas
recipes.ingredients:
1.5 lbs chicken breast, sliced
3 bell peppers, sliced
1 onion, sliced
2 tbsp olive oil
2 tbsp fajita seasoning
Tortillas
Sour cream, salsa, lime for serving
recipes.directions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Toss chicken, peppers, and onion with oil and seasoning on a sheet pan. Spread in a single layer. Bake 20–25 minutes until chicken is cooked through. Serve in warm tortillas with toppings.
recipes.description: Everything on one pan — minimal cleanup.

recipes.name: One-Pot Pasta with Sausage and Spinach
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb Italian sausage, casings removed
1 lb penne pasta
4 cups chicken broth
1 can (14 oz) diced tomatoes
3 cups fresh spinach
1 cup shredded mozzarella
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 tsp Italian seasoning
recipes.directions: Brown sausage in a large pot, breaking into pieces. Add garlic, cook 1 minute. Add broth, tomatoes, Italian seasoning, and pasta. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer 12–15 minutes until pasta is tender. Stir in spinach until wilted. Top with mozzarella.
recipes.description: A complete meal from one pot.

recipes.name: Honey Garlic Salmon
recipes.ingredients:
4 salmon fillets
3 tbsp honey
2 tbsp soy sauce
3 cloves garlic, minced
1 tbsp olive oil
1 tbsp butter
Steamed broccoli for serving
recipes.directions: Pat salmon dry and season with salt and pepper. Heat oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear salmon skin-side up for 3 minutes. Flip. Add butter, garlic, honey, and soy sauce around the fish. Baste the salmon. Transfer to 400°F oven for 5–7 minutes until fish flakes easily.
recipes.description: Restaurant-quality salmon in under 20 minutes.

recipes.name: Black Bean Quesadillas
recipes.ingredients:
1 can (15 oz) black beans, drained and rinsed
2 cups shredded cheddar or Mexican blend
1 cup corn (frozen is fine)
1/2 cup salsa
1 tsp cumin
8 flour tortillas
Butter for cooking
Sour cream, guacamole for serving
recipes.directions: Mash half the beans roughly. Mix all beans with cheese, corn, salsa, and cumin. Spread filling on tortillas, fold in half. Cook in a buttered skillet over medium heat, 3–4 minutes per side until golden and cheese is melted. Cut into wedges.
recipes.description: Always a crowd-pleaser, ready in 20 minutes.

recipes.name: Teriyaki Chicken Stir-Fry
recipes.ingredients:
1.5 lbs chicken breast, cubed
2 cups broccoli florets
1 bell pepper, sliced
1 cup snap peas
2 carrots, sliced thin
1/3 cup soy sauce
2 tbsp honey
1 tbsp rice vinegar
1 tbsp cornstarch
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 tsp ginger, grated
2 tbsp vegetable oil
Rice for serving
recipes.directions: Whisk soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and cornstarch. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over high heat. Cook chicken 5–6 minutes until browned. Remove. Add vegetables and cook 3–4 minutes until crisp-tender. Return chicken, add garlic, ginger, and sauce. Cook 2 minutes until sauce thickens. Serve over rice.
recipes.description: Better than takeout.

recipes.name: BLT Pasta Salad
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb rotini pasta
8 slices bacon, cooked and crumbled
2 cups cherry tomatoes, halved
1 head romaine lettuce, chopped
1/2 cup mayonnaise
2 tbsp ranch dressing
1 tbsp lemon juice
Salt and pepper to taste
recipes.directions: Cook pasta according to package directions, drain and cool. Whisk mayo, ranch, and lemon juice. Toss pasta with bacon, tomatoes, lettuce, and dressing. Season to taste. Serve immediately or chill.
recipes.description: Great for warm evenings when you want something light.

recipes.name: Skillet Beef Tacos
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb ground beef
1 packet taco seasoning (or 2 tbsp homemade)
1/2 cup water
Taco shells or small tortillas
Shredded lettuce
Diced tomatoes
Shredded cheese
Sour cream
Salsa
recipes.directions: Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat, breaking into crumbles. Drain fat. Add taco seasoning and water. Simmer 5 minutes until thickened. Serve in shells or tortillas with toppings.
recipes.description: The classic 15-minute family dinner.

recipes.name: Pesto Chicken with Roasted Tomatoes
recipes.ingredients:
4 chicken breasts
1/3 cup basil pesto
2 cups cherry tomatoes
1 tbsp olive oil
4 slices fresh mozzarella
Salt and pepper
Balsamic glaze for drizzling
recipes.directions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Place chicken in a baking dish. Spread pesto over each breast. Scatter tomatoes around chicken and drizzle with olive oil. Season everything with salt and pepper. Bake 20 minutes. Top chicken with mozzarella and bake 5 more minutes until cheese melts. Drizzle with balsamic glaze.
recipes.description: Feels fancy, but it's just pesto and an oven.

packs.name: Family Comfort Food
packs.description: Hearty classics the whole family loves

recipes.name: Classic Chicken Pot Pie
recipes.ingredients:
2 cups cooked chicken, shredded
1 cup frozen peas and carrots
1/2 cup frozen corn
1/3 cup butter
1/3 cup flour
1/2 cup onion, diced
2 cups chicken broth
1 cup milk
Salt and pepper
2 refrigerated pie crusts
recipes.directions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Melt butter, cook onion until soft. Stir in flour to make a roux. Slowly add broth and milk, stirring until thickened. Add chicken, peas, carrots, corn. Season. Pour into pie crust in a 9-inch pie dish. Top with second crust, crimp edges, cut slits. Bake 30–35 minutes until golden.
recipes.description: Uses rotisserie chicken to save time.

recipes.name: Baked Mac and Cheese
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb elbow macaroni
4 tbsp butter
1/4 cup flour
3 cups milk
3 cups sharp cheddar, shredded
1 cup gruyere or fontina, shredded
1 tsp mustard powder
Salt and pepper
1/2 cup breadcrumbs
2 tbsp melted butter
recipes.directions: Cook pasta 2 minutes short of package directions. Make a roux with butter and flour, then slowly whisk in milk. Cook until thickened. Remove from heat, stir in cheeses and mustard until smooth. Combine with pasta in a baking dish. Top with breadcrumbs mixed with melted butter. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes until bubbly and golden.
recipes.description: The real deal — creamy, crunchy-topped mac and cheese.

recipes.name: Beef Stew
recipes.ingredients:
2 lbs beef chuck, cubed
4 potatoes, cubed
3 carrots, sliced
2 stalks celery, sliced
1 onion, diced
3 cloves garlic, minced
4 cups beef broth
1 can (6 oz) tomato paste
2 tbsp flour
2 tbsp olive oil
1 tsp thyme
2 bay leaves
Salt and pepper
recipes.directions: Toss beef with flour, salt, and pepper. Brown in oil in a large pot. Remove beef. Sauté onion, garlic, celery. Add tomato paste, cook 1 minute. Return beef, add broth, thyme, bay leaves. Simmer 1 hour. Add potatoes and carrots, simmer 30 more minutes until vegetables are tender. Remove bay leaves.
recipes.description: Low effort, just needs time. Perfect for weekends or make-ahead.

recipes.name: Homemade Pizza
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb pizza dough (store-bought is fine)
1/2 cup pizza sauce
2 cups shredded mozzarella
Toppings of choice: pepperoni, mushrooms, olives, bell peppers, sausage
1 tbsp olive oil
Cornmeal for dusting
recipes.directions: Preheat oven to 475°F with a baking sheet inside. Stretch dough on a floured surface. Slide onto cornmeal-dusted parchment. Spread sauce, add cheese and toppings. Transfer to hot baking sheet. Bake 12–15 minutes until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.
recipes.description: Kids can help pick toppings. Better than delivery.

recipes.name: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipes.ingredients:
1 rotisserie chicken, shredded
8 oz egg noodles
2 carrots, diced
2 stalks celery, diced
1 onion, diced
3 cloves garlic, minced
8 cups chicken broth
2 tbsp butter
1 tsp thyme
2 bay leaves
Salt and pepper
Fresh parsley
recipes.directions: Melt butter in a large pot. Sauté onion, carrots, celery, and garlic until softened, about 5 minutes. Add broth, thyme, bay leaves. Bring to a boil. Add noodles and cook 8 minutes. Stir in shredded chicken. Season with salt and pepper. Garnish with parsley.
recipes.description: Rotisserie chicken makes this effortless.

recipes.name: Meatloaf
recipes.ingredients:
2 lbs ground beef
1 cup breadcrumbs
2 eggs
1/2 cup milk
1/2 cup onion, finely diced
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 tsp Worcestershire sauce
1/2 cup ketchup
2 tbsp brown sugar
1 tbsp mustard
Salt and pepper
recipes.directions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Mix beef, breadcrumbs, eggs, milk, onion, garlic, Worcestershire, salt, and pepper. Shape into a loaf on a rimmed baking sheet. Mix ketchup, brown sugar, and mustard; spread over top. Bake 50–60 minutes until internal temp reaches 160°F. Rest 10 minutes before slicing.
recipes.description: Old-school comfort. Great with mashed potatoes.

recipes.name: Chili
recipes.ingredients:
1.5 lbs ground beef
1 onion, diced
3 cloves garlic, minced
1 can (28 oz) crushed tomatoes
2 cans (15 oz each) kidney beans, drained
1 can (15 oz) black beans, drained
2 tbsp chili powder
1 tsp cumin
1 tsp paprika
Salt and pepper
Shredded cheese, sour cream, green onions for topping
recipes.directions: Brown beef and onion in a large pot. Add garlic, cook 1 minute. Add tomatoes, all beans, and spices. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer 30 minutes (longer is better). Serve with toppings.
recipes.description: Makes great leftovers. Freezes well.

recipes.name: Spaghetti and Meatballs
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb spaghetti
1 lb ground beef
1/2 lb ground pork or Italian sausage
1/2 cup breadcrumbs
1 egg
1/4 cup parmesan, grated
2 cloves garlic, minced
1 jar (24 oz) marinara sauce
Fresh basil
Salt and pepper
recipes.directions: Mix beef, pork, breadcrumbs, egg, parmesan, garlic, salt, and pepper. Form into 1.5-inch meatballs. Brown meatballs in an oiled skillet on all sides. Add marinara sauce, cover, and simmer 15 minutes. Cook spaghetti according to package. Serve meatballs and sauce over pasta. Top with basil and more parmesan.
recipes.description: Homemade meatballs make all the difference.

packs.name: Slow Cooker & Make-Ahead
packs.description: Prep in the morning, dinner's ready when you are

recipes.name: Slow Cooker Pulled Pork
recipes.ingredients:
3–4 lb pork shoulder/butt
1 cup BBQ sauce (plus more for serving)
1/2 cup apple cider vinegar
1/2 cup chicken broth
2 tbsp brown sugar
1 tbsp paprika
1 tbsp garlic powder
1 tsp cumin
Salt and pepper
Buns and coleslaw for serving
recipes.directions: Mix dry seasonings and rub all over pork. Place in slow cooker. Pour in broth and vinegar. Cook on LOW 8–10 hours or HIGH 4–5 hours until pork shreds easily. Shred with two forks. Stir in BBQ sauce. Serve on buns with coleslaw.
recipes.description: Set it in the morning, shred it at dinner. Feeds a crowd.

recipes.name: Slow Cooker Chicken Tortilla Soup
recipes.ingredients:
1.5 lbs chicken breast
1 can (15 oz) black beans, drained
1 can (15 oz) corn, drained
1 can (14 oz) diced tomatoes
1 can (4 oz) diced green chiles
4 cups chicken broth
1 tsp cumin
1 tsp chili powder
1/2 tsp garlic powder
Tortilla chips, avocado, cheese, sour cream, lime for serving
recipes.directions: Add chicken, beans, corn, tomatoes, chiles, broth, and spices to slow cooker. Cook LOW 6–8 hours or HIGH 3–4 hours. Remove chicken, shred, return to pot. Serve in bowls topped with crushed tortilla chips, avocado, cheese, sour cream, and lime.
recipes.description: Dump everything in and walk away.

recipes.name: Slow Cooker Beef Stroganoff
recipes.ingredients:
2 lbs beef stew meat
1 onion, diced
8 oz mushrooms, sliced
3 cloves garlic, minced
2 cups beef broth
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp Dijon mustard
1 cup sour cream
2 tbsp flour
Egg noodles
Salt and pepper
Fresh parsley
recipes.directions: Place beef, onion, mushrooms, garlic, broth, Worcestershire, and mustard in slow cooker. Cook LOW 7–8 hours. Whisk flour into sour cream, stir into the pot. Cook 15 more minutes until thickened. Serve over egg noodles with parsley.
recipes.description: Rich and creamy. Add the sour cream at the end for best texture.

recipes.name: Slow Cooker Butter Chicken
recipes.ingredients:
2 lbs chicken thighs, boneless skinless
1 can (14 oz) tomato sauce
1 can (14 oz) coconut milk
1 onion, diced
4 cloves garlic, minced
1 tbsp ginger, grated
2 tbsp garam masala
1 tsp turmeric
1 tsp cumin
1/2 tsp cayenne (optional)
2 tbsp butter
Rice and naan for serving
Fresh cilantro
recipes.directions: Add chicken, tomato sauce, onion, garlic, ginger, and all spices to slow cooker. Cook LOW 6–8 hours. Remove chicken and shred or cut into pieces. Stir coconut milk and butter into the sauce. Return chicken. Serve over rice with naan and cilantro.
recipes.description: Restaurant-quality butter chicken with almost no effort.

recipes.name: Make-Ahead Baked Ziti
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb ziti pasta
1 lb Italian sausage
1 jar (24 oz) marinara sauce
15 oz ricotta cheese
2 cups shredded mozzarella
1/2 cup parmesan, grated
1 egg
2 cloves garlic, minced
Fresh basil
Salt and pepper
recipes.directions: Cook pasta 2 minutes short. Brown sausage, drain. Mix ricotta, egg, half the mozzarella, parmesan, garlic, salt, and pepper. Layer in a 9x13 dish: half the pasta, half the sauce, all the ricotta mixture, remaining pasta, remaining sauce, remaining mozzarella. Cover with foil. Can refrigerate overnight. Bake at 375°F covered for 25 min, uncovered 15 min until bubbly.
recipes.description: Assemble the night before, bake when you get home.

recipes.name: Overnight Breakfast Casserole
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb breakfast sausage
6 slices bread, cubed
8 eggs
2 cups milk
2 cups shredded cheddar cheese
1 tsp mustard powder
1/2 tsp salt
1/4 tsp pepper
Green onions (optional)
recipes.directions: Brown sausage and drain. Layer bread cubes in a greased 9x13 dish. Top with sausage and cheese. Whisk eggs, milk, mustard, salt, and pepper. Pour over everything. Cover and refrigerate overnight. In the morning, bake at 350°F for 45–50 minutes until set and golden.
recipes.description: Prep Saturday night, bake Sunday morning.

recipes.name: Freezer-Friendly Enchiladas
recipes.ingredients:
2 cups cooked chicken, shredded
1 can (15 oz) black beans, drained
1 cup corn
2 cups shredded Mexican blend cheese
1 can (10 oz) enchilada sauce
8 flour tortillas
1/2 cup sour cream
1 tsp cumin
Cilantro and green onions for topping
recipes.directions: Mix chicken, beans, corn, 1 cup cheese, sour cream, half the enchilada sauce, and cumin. Fill tortillas, roll up, and place seam-side down in a greased 9x13 dish. Pour remaining sauce over top. Sprinkle with remaining cheese. Bake at 375°F for 20–25 minutes. Or cover tightly and freeze — bake from frozen at 375°F for 45–50 minutes.
recipes.description: Make a double batch and freeze one for a busy week.

packs.name: Kid-Friendly Favorites
packs.description: Meals even picky eaters will go for

recipes.name: Chicken Tenders with Honey Mustard
recipes.ingredients:
1.5 lbs chicken breast, cut into strips
1 cup flour
2 eggs, beaten
1.5 cups panko breadcrumbs
1/2 cup parmesan, grated
1 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp paprika
Salt and pepper
Cooking spray
Honey mustard: 3 tbsp honey + 3 tbsp Dijon mustard + 2 tbsp mayo
recipes.directions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Set up three bowls: flour, beaten eggs, panko mixed with parmesan and spices. Coat chicken in flour, then egg, then panko mixture. Place on a sprayed baking sheet. Spray tops lightly. Bake 15–18 minutes, flipping halfway, until golden and cooked through. Mix honey mustard dipping sauce.
recipes.description: Baked, not fried — crispier than you'd expect.

recipes.name: Mini Meatball Subs
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb ground beef
1/4 cup breadcrumbs
1 egg
2 tbsp parmesan, grated
1 tsp Italian seasoning
1 jar (24 oz) marinara sauce
4–6 sub rolls
1 cup shredded mozzarella
Salt and pepper
recipes.directions: Mix beef, breadcrumbs, egg, parmesan, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper. Roll into small (1-inch) meatballs. Brown in an oiled skillet. Add marinara sauce, cover, simmer 15 minutes. Load meatballs and sauce into sub rolls, top with mozzarella. Broil 2 minutes to melt cheese if desired.
recipes.description: Smaller meatballs = easier for little hands.

recipes.name: Crispy Fish Sticks
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb white fish (cod or tilapia), cut into strips
1 cup panko breadcrumbs
1/3 cup parmesan, grated
1/2 cup flour
2 eggs, beaten
1 tsp garlic powder
1/2 tsp paprika
Salt and pepper
Lemon wedges
Tartar sauce for dipping
recipes.directions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Mix panko, parmesan, garlic powder, and paprika. Coat fish in flour, then egg, then panko mixture. Place on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Spray tops with cooking spray. Bake 12–15 minutes until golden and fish flakes. Serve with tartar sauce and lemon.
recipes.description: Way better than the frozen box. Kids love dipping.

recipes.name: Cheesy Chicken and Rice
recipes.ingredients:
1.5 lbs chicken breast
1.5 cups long grain rice
2 cups chicken broth
1 can cream of chicken soup
2 cups shredded cheddar cheese
1 cup frozen broccoli (optional)
1 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp onion powder
Salt and pepper
recipes.directions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Mix rice, broth, soup, half the cheese, broccoli, and seasonings in a 9x13 dish. Nestle chicken breasts into the mixture. Cover tightly with foil. Bake 45 minutes. Uncover, top with remaining cheese, bake 10 more minutes until rice is tender and cheese is melted. Let rest 5 minutes.
recipes.description: One dish, minimal prep, universally loved.

recipes.name: Build-Your-Own Flatbread Pizzas
recipes.ingredients:
4 naan breads or flatbreads
1/2 cup pizza sauce
2 cups shredded mozzarella
Toppings: pepperoni, ham, pineapple, olives, bell peppers, mushrooms
Italian seasoning
recipes.directions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Place flatbreads on baking sheets. Spread sauce on each, add cheese and chosen toppings. Sprinkle with Italian seasoning. Bake 10–12 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly. Let cool 2 minutes before slicing.
recipes.description: Everyone picks their own toppings — no complaints.

recipes.name: Pigs in a Blanket with Mac & Cheese
recipes.ingredients:
1 package crescent roll dough
8 hot dogs
1 box mac & cheese
Ketchup and mustard for dipping
Optional: cheese slices for wrapping
recipes.directions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Unroll crescent dough into triangles. Wrap each triangle around a hot dog (add cheese slice if desired). Place on baking sheet. Bake 12–15 minutes until golden. While baking, make mac & cheese per box directions. Serve together with ketchup and mustard.
recipes.description: Sometimes you just need an easy win.

recipes.name: Chicken Fried Rice
recipes.ingredients:
3 cups cooked rice (day-old is best)
2 chicken breasts, diced small
2 eggs, scrambled
1 cup frozen peas and carrots
3 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
2 green onions, sliced
2 cloves garlic, minced
2 tbsp vegetable oil
recipes.directions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over high heat. Cook chicken until done, 5–6 minutes. Remove. Scramble eggs in the same pan, break into pieces. Add more oil, then frozen veggies and garlic. Cook 2 minutes. Add rice, soy sauce, sesame oil. Toss everything together over high heat for 3–4 minutes. Return chicken and eggs. Top with green onions.
recipes.description: Great way to use leftover rice. Kids love it.
